scenario.title: The Resume Parser
scenario.context: Your HR platform needs to extract structured data from resumes uploaded as plain text. The AI needs to identify and categorize different types of information from unstructured resume text.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that performs named entity recognition on resume text, extracting categorized information into a structured format.
constraints: Extract: contact info, work experience, education, skills
Work experience needs: company, title, dates, descriptions
Education needs: institution, degree, field, graduation date
Skills should be categorized (technical, soft, languages)
scenario.exampleInput:
John Smith | john.smith@email.com | (555) 123-4567

Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp (2020-Present)
Built scalable APIs serving 1M requests/day. Led team of 5 engineers.

Software Engineer at StartupXYZ (2017-2020)
Full-stack development using React and Node.js.

BS Computer Science, MIT, 2017

Skills: Python, JavaScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Team Leadership, Agile
hints: Define entity types and their attributes
Specify how to handle date ranges vs single dates
Consider how to categorize mixed skill lists

rubric.name: Entity Type Definition
rubric.description: Are all entity types clearly defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: All entity types with attributes and examples
Nested arrays with full attribute specs

rubric.name: Date Handling
rubric.description: Are date formats and ranges handled?

scoringGuide.excellent: Date formats, ranges, and 'Present' handling specified

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Parse this resume and extract structured data into the following JSON format:

```json
{
  "contact": {
    "name": "Full Name",
    "email": "email@example.com",
    "phone": "5551234567",
    "linkedin": "url or null",
    "location": "City, State or null"
  },
  "work_experience": [
    {
      "company": "Company Name",
      "title": "Job Title",
      "start_date": "2020-01",
      "end_date": "present",
      "is_current": true,
      "description": ["Achievement 1", "Achievement 2"],
      "duration_months": 48
    }
  ],
  "education": [
    {
      "institution": "University Name",
      "degree": "BS",
      "field": "Computer Science",
      "graduation_date": "2017-05",
      "gpa": null
    }
  ],
  "skills": {
    "technical": ["Python", "JavaScript", "AWS"],
    "soft": ["Team Leadership", "Communication"],
    "languages": ["English", "Spanish"]
  }
}
```

Rules:
- Sort work_experience by start_date descending (most recent first)
- Date format: YYYY-MM (use -01 if only year given)
- "Present" or "Current" → end_date: "present", is_current: true
- Calculate duration_months from date range
- Phone: digits only
- Skills categorization:
  - technical: programming languages, frameworks, tools, platforms
  - soft: leadership, communication, management skills
  - languages: spoken/written languages (not programming)

Return ONLY the JSON.
